title: Add house style syncing for commands, rules, and process flows across repos

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Kickoff for GH #57. Launching autonomous agent in worktree to implement house style syncing — crosslink style sync/diff commands, house-style config, and selective adoption of rules/hooks/commands from a remote source.

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Agent launched in tmux session feat-add-house-style-syncing. Worktree: .worktrees/add-house-style-syncing, branch: feature/add-house-style-syncing. Implements crosslink style set/sync/diff/show/unset commands with selective component adoption and custom marker preservation.

comments.author: m1--f3
comments.content: Starting implementation. Pattern: add style.rs module, StyleCommands enum in main.rs, HouseStyleConfig serde struct. Components map: rules→.crosslink/rules/, hooks→.claude/hooks/, commands→.claude/commands/, config→hook-config.json merge. Reuse CUSTOM_MARKER pattern from review.rs.
